selection: 按 4–7 岁 阅读者的常用词频与中小学词汇标记筛选

words.translation: n. 一点点, 少许, 一会儿, 短时间；a. 小的, 很少的, 幼小的, 琐碎的, 短暂的, 矮小的
words.definition: n. a small amount or duration

words.translation: adv. 离去
words.definition: s. not present; having left

words.translation: n. 插座, 千斤顶, 男人；vt. 抬起, 提醒, 扛举, 增加, 提高, 放弃
words.definition: n. a small worthless amount

words.translation: n. 男孩
words.definition: n. a friendly informal reference to a grown man

words.translation: n. 妻子, 太太, 夫人
words.definition: n. a married woman; a man's partner in marriage

words.translation: a. 疯狂的, 发疯的, 生气的, 愚蠢的, 狂欢的；n. 狂怒
words.definition: s roused to anger

words.translation: n. 例证, 插图
words.definition: n. artwork that helps make something clear or attractive

words.translation: n. 婴孩
words.definition: n. a very young child (birth to 1 year) who has not yet begun to walk or talk

words.translation: n. 雨, 下雨, 雨天；vi. 下雨
words.definition: n. water falling in drops from vapor condensed in the atmosphere

words.translation: n. 黑色, 黑颜料；a. 黑色的
words.definition: n. the quality or state of the achromatic color of least lightness (bearing the least resemblance to white)

words.translation: n. 市场, 交易, 集市, 推销地区, 行情, 市面, 销路；vt. 在市场上交易, 使上市, 销售
words.definition: n. the world of commercial activity where goods and services are bought and sold

words.translation: n. 白色, 洁白, 眼白, 白种人, 蛋白；a. 白色的, 纯洁的, 白种的, 苍白的, 空白的, 幸运的
words.definition: n. a member of the Caucasoid race

words.translation: n. 便士, 一分, 小钱, 点滴
words.definition: n. a fractional monetary unit of Ireland and the United Kingdom; equal to one hundredth of a pound

words.translation: n. 失误, 避免, 失败, 小姐；vt. 未得到, 未达到, 未听到, 未觉察, 逃脱, 遗漏, 错过, 思念
words.definition: n. a failure to hit (or meet or find etc)

words.translation: vi. 唱, 唱歌, 演唱, 鸣, 啼；vt. 唱, 歌颂
words.definition: v. deliver by singing

words.translation: n. 蓝色；a. 蓝色的, 下流的, 忧郁的
words.definition: n. blue color or pigment; resembling the color of the clear sky in the daytime

words.translation: vi. 逐渐消失, 逐渐减少
words.definition: n. disciple of Jesus and leader of the Apostles; regarded by Catholics as the vicar of Christ on earth and first Pope

words.translation: adv. 相当, 完全, 十分
words.definition: r. to a degree (not used with a negative)

words.translation: n. 母牛, 母兽；vt. 威胁
words.definition: n. female of domestic cattle: "`moo-cow' is a child's term"

words.translation: num. 七, 七个
words.definition: n. the cardinal number that is the sum of six and one

words.translation: n. 家, 避难所, 故乡；a. 家庭的, 国内的, 打中目标的
words.definition: n. where you live at a particular time

words.translation: a. 热的, 热心的, 辣的, 热情的, 激动的, 猛烈的, 紧迫的；adv. 热, 紧迫地
words.definition: a. used of physical heat; having a high or higher than desirable temperature or giving off heat or feeling or causing a sensation of heat or burning

words.translation: n. 玛丽（女子名）
words.definition: n. the mother of Jesus; Christians refer to her as the Virgin Mary; she is especially honored by Roman Catholics

words.translation: vt. 买, 获得；vi. 买
words.definition: v. obtain by purchase; acquire by means of a financial transaction

words.translation: n. 十字架, 十字架形物件, 交叉, 十字标, 交叉路, 磨难, 杂交；a. 生气的, 交叉的, 相反的
words.definition: n. a wooden structure consisting of an upright post with a transverse piece

words.translation: n. 落下, 瀑布, 采伐量, 下降, 落差, 降低, 堕落, 秋天；vi. 倒下, 落下, 来临, 失守, 阵亡, 下跌, 减弱, 倾斜, 垮台, 轮到, 变成, 降低
words.definition: n. the season when the leaves fall from the trees

words.translation: n. 母亲, 修女院长；vt. 产生, 照看, 收养
words.definition: n. a woman who has given birth to a child (also used as a term of address to your mother)

words.translation: n. 页, 记录, 事件, 专栏, 男侍；vt. 标明...的页数, 翻...的书页, 分页排版, 呼叫, 侍候
words.definition: n. one side of one leaf (of a book or magazine or newspaper or letter etc.) or the written or pictorial matter it contains

words.translation: n. 游戏, 游玩, 玩笑, 运动, 比赛, 赌博, 跳动, 表演, 剧本；v. 玩, 游戏, 假装, 开玩笑, 比赛, 扮演, 演奏, 演戏, 传摇曳, (使)跳动
words.definition: n. a dramatic work intended for performance by actors on a stage

words.translation: a. 红的, 红色的, 红肿的, 流血的；n. 红色, 红颜料, 赤字
words.definition: n. red color or pigment; the chromatic color resembling the hue of blood

words.translation: interj. 再会, 回头见
words.definition: n. you advance to the next round in a tournament without playing an opponent

words.translation: n. 蛋糕, 块, 饼；vt. 使结块, 加块状物于
words.definition: n. a block of solid substance (such as soap or wax)

words.translation: n. 猫, 恶妇；vi. 呕吐
words.definition: n. feline mammal usually having thick soft fur and no ability to roar: domestic cats; wildcats

words.translation: n. 月亮, 月球, 月光；vi. 闲荡
words.definition: n. the natural satellite of the Earth

words.translation: num. 十, 十个
words.definition: n. the cardinal number that is the sum of nine and one; the base of the decimal system

words.translation: a. 快速的, 紧的；adv. 很快地, 紧紧地, 彻底地
words.definition: n. abstaining from food

words.translation: n. 马, 骑兵, 脚架；vi. 骑马, 取笑
words.definition: n. solid-hoofed herbivorous quadruped domesticated since prehistoric times

words.translation: n. 骑马, 乘坐, 乘车, 搭便车；vt. 骑, 乘坐, 压迫, 控制
words.definition: n. a mechanical device that you ride for amusement or excitement

words.translation: n. 歌, 曲, 鸣声, 歌唱, 歌曲, 诗歌
words.definition: n. a short musical composition with words

words.translation: prep. 在...之上, 迫近, 紧接着
words.definition: prep. On; -- used in all the senses of that word, with which it

words.translation: n. 心跳(声), 打, 敲打声, 拍子；v. 打, 拍打, 打败
words.definition: n. a regular route for a sentry or policeman

words.translation: adv. 在后地；prep. 在...背后
words.definition: s. having the lower score or lagging position in a contest

words.translation: n. 美元, 元(加、澳等国货币单位)
words.definition: n. the basic monetary unit in many countries; equal to 100 cents

words.translation: n. 全部, 完整；a. 充满的, 完全的, 丰富的, 完美的, 丰满的, 详尽的
words.definition: v. beat for the purpose of cleaning and thickening

words.translation: n. 绿色, 绿色颜料；a. 绿色的, 未成熟的, 新鲜的, 青春的, 无经验的, 脸色发青的
words.definition: n. green color or pigment; resembling the color of growing grass

words.translation: n. 头, 头脑, 领袖, 脑袋, 最前的部分；vt. 为首, 朝向, 前进, 用头顶
words.definition: n. the upper part of the human body or the front part of the body in animals; contains the face and brains

words.translation: n. 早晨, 早上, 初期
words.definition: n. the time period between dawn and noon

words.translation: n. 羊, 胆小者
words.definition: n. woolly usually horned ruminant mammal related to the goat

words.translation: n. 先生, 阁下

words.translation: vi. 坐, 就座, 坐落；vt. 使就座, 骑

words.translation: n. 儿子, 女婿, 子孙

words.translation: adv. 不久, 早, 快, 宁可

words.translation: num. 九, 九个

words.translation: n. 感冒, 寒冷；a. 寒冷的, 冷淡的, 冷静的

words.translation: v. 吃, 腐蚀

words.translation: n. 枪
words.definition: n. a weapon that discharges a missile at high velocity (especially from a metal tube or barrel)

words.translation: n. 国王, 君主；vt. 使...成为君主

words.translation: adv. 平行地, 向前；prep. 沿着
words.definition: r. with a forward motion

words.translation: a. 坏的；n. 坏
words.definition: n. that which is below standard or expectations as of ethics or decency

words.translation: n. 兄弟

words.translation: v. 考虑, 思考, 认为

words.translation: n. 切口, 割伤, 降低, 切, 割, 砍, 削, 伤口, 削减, 缩短, 删节, 通路；a. 经切割的, 缩减的

words.translation: n. 门

words.translation: vi. 拉, 拖, 拔剑；vt. 拖拉, 挨近, 领取, 打成平局, 引导, 抽签决定, 画, 描写, 制订, 草拟, 吸引

words.translation: n. 父亲, 祖先, 长辈, 神父, 创始者；vt. 当...的父亲, 保护, 创作, 发明, 培养

words.translation: n. 苍蝇, 两翼昆虫, 飞行；vi. 飞, 飞翔, 飘扬, 逃走
